name: pi-extensions
description: Collection of extensions, skills, and themes for Pi Coding Agent
author: luongnv89

scripts.install-all: mkdir -p ~/.pi/agent/extensions ~/.pi/agent/themes ~/.pi/agent/skills && cp -r extensions/* ~/.pi/agent/extensions/ && cp -r themes/* ~/.pi/agent/themes/ && cp -r skills/* ~/.pi/agent/skills/ && echo 'Installation complete. Please reload Pi.'
scripts.install-extensions: mkdir -p ~/.pi/agent/extensions && cp -r extensions/* ~/.pi/agent/extensions/ && echo 'Extensions installed. Please reload Pi.'
scripts.install-themes: mkdir -p ~/.pi/agent/themes && cp -r themes/* ~/.pi/agent/themes/ && echo 'Themes installed. Please reload Pi.'
scripts.install-skills: mkdir -p ~/.pi/agent/skills && cp -r skills/* ~/.pi/agent/skills/ && echo 'Skills installed. Please reload Pi.'
